'''鈭歸-th-t''' ('''kawathat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vurp|vurp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vurp|vurp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-th-t
|-
! Lemma
| kawathat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwathat|thiwathat]] || [[word:jiwathat|jiwathat]] || [[word:shiwathat|shiwathat]] || [[word:kiwathat|kiwathat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwathat|thuthuwathat]] || [[word:jujuwathat|jujuwathat]] || [[word:shushuwathat|shushuwathat]] || [[word:kukuwathat|kukuwathat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwathat|thuwathat]] || [[word:juwathat|juwathat]] || [[word:shuwathat|shuwathat]] || [[word:kuwathat|kuwathat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwathat|thuwathat]] || [[word:juwathat|juwathat]] || [[word:shuwathat|shuwathat]] || [[word:kuwathat|kuwathat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewathat|thewathat]] || [[word:jewathat|jewathat]] || [[word:shewathat|shewathat]] || [[word:kewathat|kewathat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowathat|thothowathat]] || [[word:jojowathat|jojowathat]] || [[word:shoshowathat|shoshowathat]] || [[word:kokowathat|kokowathat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowathat|thowathat]] || [[word:jowathat|jowathat]] || [[word:showathat|showathat]] || [[word:kowathat|kowathat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowathat|thowathat]] || [[word:jowathat|jowathat]] || [[word:showathat|showathat]] || [[word:kowathat|kowathat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]] || [[word:wathat|wathat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wathat|th忙wathat]] || [[word:j忙wathat|j忙wathat]] || [[word:sh忙wathat|sh忙wathat]] || [[word:k忙wathat|k忙wathat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawathat|thathawathat]] || [[word:jajawathat|jajawathat]] || [[word:shashawathat|shashawathat]] || [[word:kakawathat|kakawathat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawathat|thawathat]] || [[word:jawathat|jawathat]] || [[word:shawathat|shawathat]] || [[word:kawathat|kawathat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawathat|thawathat]] || [[word:jawathat|jawathat]] || [[word:shawathat|shawathat]] || [[word:kawathat|kawathat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawathat|shawathat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawathat|goshawathat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawathat|gokishawathat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawathatn眉|shawathatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawathatnkn眉|goshawathatnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathatn眉|gokishawathatn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawathatsh毛|shawathatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawathatnksh毛|goshawathatnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawathatsh毛|gokishawathatsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathatro|shawathatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathatnkro|goshawathatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathatro|gokishawathatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathatmu|shawathatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathatnkmu|goshawathatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathatmu|gokishawathatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawathatsher|shawathatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawathatnksher|goshawathatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawathatsher|gokishawathatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawathatng|shawathatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawathatnkng|goshawathatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawathatng|gokishawathatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawathatya|shawathatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawathatnkya|goshawathatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawathatya|gokishawathatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawathatyam|shawathatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawathatnkyam|goshawathatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawathatyam|gokishawathatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathatn眉sh毛|shawathatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathatnkn眉sh毛|goshawathatnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathatn眉sh毛|gokishawathatn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathatn眉ro|shawathatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathatnkn眉ro|goshawathatnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathatn眉ro|gokishawathatn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathatn眉mu|shawathatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathatnkn眉mu|goshawathatnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathatn眉mu|gokishawathatn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathatsh毛n眉|shawathatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathatnksh毛n眉|goshawathatnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathatsh毛n眉|gokishawathatsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathatsh毛ro|shawathatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathatnksh毛ro|goshawathatnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathatsh毛ro|gokishawathatsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathatsh毛mu|shawathatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathatnksh毛mu|goshawathatnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathatsh毛mu|gokishawathatsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathatron眉|shawathatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathatnkron眉|goshawathatnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathatron眉|gokishawathatron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathatrosh毛|shawathatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathatnkrosh毛|goshawathatnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathatrosh毛|gokishawathatrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawathatromu|shawathatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawathatnkromu|goshawathatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawathatromu|gokishawathatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawathatmun眉|shawathatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawathatnkmun眉|goshawathatnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawathatmun眉|gokishawathatmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawathatmush毛|shawathatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawathatnkmush毛|goshawathatnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawathatmush毛|gokishawathatmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawathatmuro|shawathatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawathatnkmuro|goshawathatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawathatmuro|gokishawathatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|b863984}}
